name: Salmon Sushi
recipeInstructions:
1. Filet out the middle portion from back to front.
2. Marinate for one day in a mixture of salt and 5% vinegar until the surface of the fish is "cooked" (like seviche).
3. Freeze overnight.
4. Slice thin and serve.
Note: I didn't get the proportions of salt and vinegar, but it's assumed to be very similar to what I use for pickling fish.
